footer.tagline: {name} — run your whole business from one place.
footer.whyReceiving: You are receiving this email because you have an account at {name}.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Creative Digital Accounting
welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.preheader: Your account has been created successfully.
welcome.intro: We’re glad you joined. Your account is ready and you can now manage invoices, documents, clients, inventory and finances from one place.
welcome.introVerify: For full access, please confirm your email address using the button below:
welcome.introStart: Log in to your dashboard to get started.
welcome.footnote: If you didn’t create this account, you can ignore this email.

verify.subject: Confirm your email address
verify.title: Confirm your email address
verify.intro2: Click the button below to confirm that this email address belongs to you. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verify.footnote: If you didn’t sign up, please ignore this email.

reset.subject: Password reset
reset.title: Forgot password
reset.intro2: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password. The link is valid for 60 minutes.
reset.footnote: If you didn’t request a password reset, ignore this email — your password stays unchanged.

changed.subject: Your password was changed
changed.title: Your password was changed successfully
changed.intro2: This is a confirmation that your account password has been changed.
changed.footnote: If you didn’t make this change, contact us immediately at office@creativedigitalaccounting.com.
